title: Transmission of physical sidelink feedback channels
abstract: Apparatuses and methods for transmission of physical sidelink feedback channels (PSFCHs). A method performed by a user equipment (UE) in a wireless communication system includes receiving first information related to a sidelink operation on multiple sidelink carriers and receiving, via a sidelink control information (SCI) format, second information related to a first carrier from the multiple sidelink carriers for transmission of a PSFCH. The PSFCH includes hybrid automatic repeat request acknowledgement (HARQ-ACK) information corresponding to reception of a physical sidelink shared channel (PSSCH). Reception of a physical sidelink control channel (PSCCH) associated with the PSSCH is on a second carrier. The method further includes determining a resource for transmission of the PSFCH on the first carrier from a sidelink resource pool of PSFCH resources associated with the first carrier and transmitting the PSFCH on the first carrier using the resource.
claims: Claims ( 15 ) A user equipment (UE) in a wireless communication system, the UE comprising: a transceiver configured to: ã receive first information related to a sidelink operation on multiple sidelink carriers, and ã receive, via a sidelink control information (SCI) format, second information related to a first carrier from the multiple sidelink carriers for transmission of a physical sidelink feedback channel (PSFCH), wherein: ãã the PSFCH includes hybrid automatic repeat request acknowledgement (HARQ-ACK) information corresponding to reception of a physical sidelink shared channel (PSSCH), and ãã reception of a physical sidelink control channel (PSCCH) associated with the PSSCH is on a second carrier; and a processor operably coupled to the transceiver, the processor configured to determine a resource for transmission of the PSFCH on the first carrier from a sidelink resource pool of PSFCH resources associated with the first carrier, wherein the transceiver is further configured to transmit the PSFCH on the first carrier using the resource. The UE of claim 1, wherein: the PSCCH includes the SCI format that schedules the reception of the PSSCH, and reception of the PSSCH is on the first carrier. The UE of claim 1, wherein: the transceiver is further configured to receive a mapping that associates a first set of carriers for PSSCH receptions with a second set of carriers for corresponding PSFCH transmissions, and the mapping is a one-to-one mapping or a many-to-one mapping. The UE of claim 1, wherein: the SCI format schedules receptions of a number of PSSCHs on corresponding carriers from the multiple sidelink carriers, the SCI format indicates the first carrier for transmissions of PSFCHs associated with the number of PSSCHs, and the processor is further configured to determine PSFCH resources for transmissions of PSFCHs from the sidelink resource pool of PSFCH resources associated with the first carrier. The UE of claim 1, wherein reception of the PSCCH including the SCI format is on a primary carrier, the SCI format schedules receptions of a number of PSSCHs on corresponding carriers from the multiple sidelink carriers, and the primary carrier is one of the corresponding carriers. The UE of claim 1, wherein: the transceiver is further configured to receive a set of one or more numbers for repetitions of the PSFCH, the processor is further configured to determine: ã a number of repetitions, from the set of one or more numbers for repetitions, and ã PSFCH resources for the transmission of the PSFCH with repetitions on the first carrier based on a higher layer parameter, and when the set is more than one, the number of repetitions is based on a value of a field in the SCI format. The UE of claim 6, wherein: the number of repetitions includes: ã a first number of repetitions for a transmission of a first PSFCH, and ã a second number of repetitions for a transmission of a second PSFCH; the PSFCH resources include: ã first resources in a time slot for the transmission of the first PSFCH, and ã second resources in the time slot for the transmission of the second PSFCH; and the transceiver is further configured to transmit the first PSFCH with the first number of repetitions and the second PSFCH with the second number of repetitions in the first and second resources, respectively, in the time slot. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) in a wireless communication system, the method comprising: receiving first information related to a sidelink operation on multiple sidelink carriers; receiving, via a sidelink control information (SCI) format, second information related to a first carrier from the multiple sidelink carriers for transmission of a physical sidelink feedback channel (PSFCH), wherein: ã the PSFCH includes hybrid automatic repeat request acknowledgement (HARQ-ACK) information corresponding to reception of a physical sidelink shared channel (PSSCH), and ã reception of a physical sidelink control channel (PSCCH) associated with the PSSCH is on a second carrier; determining a resource for transmission of the PSFCH on the first carrier from a sidelink resource pool of PSFCH resources associated with the first carrier; and transmitting the PSFCH on the first carrier using the resource. The method of claim 8, wherein: the PSCCH includes the SCI format that schedules the reception of the PSSCH, and reception of the PSSCH is on the first carrier, the second carrier or in a third carrier. The method of claim 8, further comprising: receiving a mapping that associates a first set of carriers for PSSCH receptions with a second set of carriers for corresponding PSFCH transmissions, wherein the mapping is a one-to-one mapping or a many-to-one mapping. The method of claim 8, wherein: the SCI format schedules receptions of a number of PSSCHs on corresponding carriers from the multiple sidelink carriers, the SCI format indicates the first carrier for transmissions of PSFCHs associated with the number of PSSCHs, and the method further comprises determining PSFCH resources for transmissions of PSFCHs from the sidelink resource pool of PSFCH resources associated with the first carrier. The method of claim 8, wherein: the SCI format schedules a number of receptions of the PSSCH on corresponding carriers from the multiple sidelink carriers, the SCI format indicates the first carrier for transmissions of PSFCHs associated with the number of receptions of the PSSCH, and the method further comprises transmitting the PSFCH with corresponding negative acknowledgment information. The method of claim 8, wherein reception of the PSCCH including the SCI format is on a primary carrier, the SCI format schedules receptions of a number of PSSCHs on corresponding carriers from the multiple sidelink carriers, and the primary carrier is one of the corresponding carriers. The method of claim 8, further comprising: receiving a set of one or more numbers for repetitions of the PSFCH; and determining: ã a number of repetitions, from the set of one or more numbers for repetitions, and ã PSFCH resources for the transmission of the PSFCH with repetitions on the first carrier based on a higher layer parameter. The method of claim 14, wherein: when the set is more than one, the number of repetitions is based on a value of a field in the SCI format, the number of repetitions includes: ã a first number of repetitions for a transmission of a first PSFCH, and ã a second number of repetitions for a transmission of a second PSFCH; the PSFCH resources include: ã first resources in a time slot for the transmission of the first PSFCH, and ã second resources in the time slot for the transmission of the second PSFCH; and the method further comprises transmitting the first PSFCH with the first number of repetitions and the second PSFCH with the second number of repetitions in the first and second resources, respectively, in the time slot.
